title: Ant Observation Extension — Enterprise Policy
description: Schema for fleet-managed configuration via ExtensionSettings / chrome.storage.managed. Set from the Google Admin Console or a Windows/Mac policy deployment. Employees cannot override these values from the popup.

tenantId.description: Customer tenant UUID issued by the Ant control plane.

ingestUrl.description: Base URL of the observation-ingest service for this tenant (e.g. https://ingest.tenant.ant.example.com).

scope.description: Capture scope. 'minimal' is the only mode permitted without a signed Betriebsvereinbarung / works-council consent.

hostAllowlist.description: Explicit list of SaaS origins in-scope for observation. Navigation events on any other origin are dropped before leaving the browser. Empty list = capture nothing.

pauseAllowed.description: If true, employee can pause capture from the popup. Mandated by the DE Betriebsvereinbarung template (§4).
